The '''''Simiyiar''-class light freighter''' was a popular [[Mon Calamari Shipyards/Legends|Mon Calamari]] transport in use during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
It was 26.3 meters in length and armed with a turreted dual [[Laser/Legends|laser]] cannon and an [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]]. It could carry eight passengers and 150 tons of cargo, and was equipped with a backup shield generator.<ref name="AIR" />

{{Ship-stub}}
